summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new CRM features: Worklist Dashboard, Customer Profile (lead/contact), Activity Timeline, Notifications dropdown, AI Call placeholders, and advanced filtering. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly including navigation, filters, profile page lifecycle stages, and notifications.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/worklist - Returns paginated leads with correct structure (passed)
Backend: /api/worklist - Pagination working (page, limit, total_pages)
Backend: /api/worklist - Status filter working
Backend: /api/worklist - Lifecycle stage filter working
Backend: /api/notifications - Returns items and unread_count
Backend: /api/notifications/read-all - Marks all as read
Backend: /api/filter-options - Returns statuses, lifecycle_stages, users, pipeline_stages, date_presets
Backend: /api/profile/lead/:id - Returns profile, activities, ai_calls, deals, stats
Backend: /api/profile/lead/:id - Returns 404 for non-existent lead
Backend: /api/ai-calls GET - Returns list of AI calls
Backend: /api/ai-calls POST - Creates AI call with placeholder message
Backend: All endpoints return 401 without auth
Frontend: Worklist Dashboard loads with correct columns (#, Customer, Contact, Assigned, Status, Lifecycle, Registered, Actions)
Frontend: Worklist filters panel opens/closes correctly
Frontend: Advanced filters (status, lifecycle_stage, assigned_to, date_from, date_to) work
Frontend: Customer Profile page loads with lead data
Frontend: Customer Lifecycle progress bar displays all 6 stages correctly
Frontend: Activity Timeline tab shows activities
Frontend: AI Calls tab shows placeholder message and existing calls
Frontend: Notifications bell icon appears in header
Frontend: Notifications dropdown opens, shows empty state, closes on click outside
Frontend: View Profile option in Leads dropdown navigates correctly to /profile/lead/:id
Frontend: Worklist navigation item visible in sidebar
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user pag1772866828@test.com with 15 leads for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully tested: Worklist Dashboard with filters (/worklist), Customer Profile with timeline (/profile/lead/:id, /profile/contact/:id), Notifications dropdown in header, AI Call placeholders. Backend endpoints: /api/worklist, /api/notifications, /api/filter-options, /api/profile/lead/:id, /api/ai-calls. All working. Test file created: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py

mocked_features.AI_CALLS: AI Call feature is a PLACEHOLDER - Returns pending status with message 'AI Call feature is a placeholder. Integration with voice provider required.'
